case_title: DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS $15,265.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,265.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
